section.heading: Restoration study

content.p: The Secretary may conduct a study to update scientific information and protocols needed to improve restoration techniques for a variety of coast habitat types and synthesize the results in a format easily understandable by restoration practitioners and local communities.
There are authorized to be appropriated $500,000 for fiscal year 2007 to conduct this study.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 94–265, title III, § 320, as added Pub. L. 109–479, title II, § 206, Jan. 12, 2007, 120 Stat. 3615.)
